chapter_title.en: The Call to Prayer and the Establishment of Prayer and the Reward of the Muezzins

text: 871 - وَ رَوَى خَالِدُ بْنُ نَجِيحٍ عَنِ اَلصَّادِقِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ: «اَلتَّكْبِيرُ جَزْمٌ فِي اَلْأَذَانِ مَعَ اَلْإِفْصَاحِ بِالْهَاءِ وَ اَلْأَلِفِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.871 - Khalid ibn Najih narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) that He said: "The takbir (saying 'Allahu Akbar') in the adhan must be pronounced firmly, with clear articulation of the 'ha' and 'alif'“.
